_comment: 圖片用途設定。prompt_suffix 會接在 style.positive_prefix + character.visual_core 之後；extra_negative 會併入 negative_prompt。width/height 為 null 時沿用畫風預設，非 null 則覆蓋（例如背景用橫向、SNS 用方形）。output_kind 決定採用後落地到 characters/ 或 cg/。

tasks.name: 角色初稿
tasks.prompt_suffix: character concept art, upper body, simple background, neutral pose, clear face, reference sheet feel

tasks.name: 透明立繪
tasks.prompt_suffix: full body, standing pose, visual novel sprite, isolated character on plain flat background, even lighting, no shadow on ground
tasks.extra_negative: complex background, scenery, props, multiple people

tasks.name: 事件 CG
tasks.prompt_suffix: event illustration, cinematic composition, detailed background, emotional scene, dynamic lighting, storytelling moment

tasks.name: 背景
tasks.prompt_suffix: background scenery only, no people, no character, establishing shot, detailed environment, atmospheric lighting

tasks.name: SNS 宣傳圖
tasks.prompt_suffix: social media promo art, eye-catching, vibrant, square composition, poster style, copy space friendly
